headline: RFK Jr. Takes On Food Giants: Calls Meeting With PepsiCo And General Mills
summary: Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is set to meet with top food industry executives to discuss health concerns and potential regulatory changes, marking a key moment in his "Make America Healthy Again" movement.

headline: Meta Secretly Keeps 'Block' Lists of Ex-Employee, Former Google HR Chief Calls It 'Unheard Of'
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ: META) is said to be maintaining a clandestine 'do not rehire' list of its former employees, who are barred from rejoining the company, irrespective of a vice president's endorsement.

summary: Justine Musk, the first wife of billionaire Elon Musk, once shared her unique insights on the journey to becoming a billionaire.

headline: Google Faces Congressional Scrutiny As House Panel Demands Internal Communications On Government Pressure: 'YouTube… Was A Direct Participant In The Federal Government's Censorship Regime'

headline: Elon Musk's xAI Acquires 1-Million-Square-Foot Property In Memphis For Supercomputer Expansion

headline: Google's Monopoly Fight Just Got More Intense: Justice Department Reaffirms Plan To Split Up The Tech Giant In Historic Antitrust Battle
summary: The Justice Department has reaffirmed its demand to break up Google, pushing for the sale of Chrome and restrictions on its search business.

headline: Apple Delays Next-Gen Siri: 'It's Going To Take Us Longer Than We Thought' To Deliver AI Upgrades
summary: Apple has delayed its next-gen Siri upgrade, citing the need for more development time, while internal reports suggest significant issues could push the AI-powered features back until iOS 20 or later.
